name: Ocal Browser V3.7.70beta: The Professional Fix
body:
### 🚀 Ocal Browser V3.7.70beta: The Professional Fix

This release introduces critical fixes for document handling and upgrades the browser to the latest stable beta.

#### 📄 PDF Icon Fix
- **Resolved Missing Icons**: PDF files now correctly display the professional Ocal icon in all Windows Explorer view modes.
- **Binary Icon Integration**: Upgraded from a simple PNG to a multi-resolution binary ICO format for native Windows support.

#### 🛡️ Neural Shield Core
- **Advanced Ad-Blocking**: Integrated the latest filter paradigms for an ad-free experience.
- **Stealth Browsing**: Improved tracker blocking and fingerprint protection.

#### 🎥 Media Integration
- **Enhanced YouTube Support**: Native integration for dislike restoration and ad-neutralization.
- **Smart Media Agent**: Improved PiP and downloading logic.

#### ⚙️ Technical Update
- **Version 3.7.70 Core**: Stabilized the underlying hardware acceleration and window management.
